author: y4rr
content: Result: All 5 bugs fixed. 362 unit + 60 continuous conformance + 41 discrete conformance + 1 surface = 464 tests pass. cargo clippy -D warnings clean. All cascade_skip calls removed from #875-#879 fixtures. Probe values: RelaxedBernoulli(temp=2.0, probs→logits=0.5, x=0.7): now -0.7893 (was 1.6186). Kumaraswamy(a=0.5,b=0.5) entropy: now -0.2274 (was divergent). Pareto(alpha=1, xm=1): mean=inf, variance=inf correct. Multinomial(n=10, p=[0.2,0.3,0.5]): mean=[2,3,5], variance=[1.6,2.1,2.5] correct.
